name: Cleveland Reporting Partners, LLC
description: Provides certified legal video specialists for video depositions, hearings, arbitrations, site documentation, day-in-the-life videos, video and transcript syncing, editing, trial playback, photography, MP4 files, DVDs, and secure streaming.

name: Veritext Legal Solutions
description: Provides professional videographers with broadcast-quality cameras for depositions; offers court reporting, videoconferencing, remote services, and deposition suites.

name: Video Discovery, Inc.
description: Specializes in high-quality video depositions using digital broadcast cameras, lavaliere microphones, external lighting, and portable backdrops; offers video syncing with DepoView, two-camera setups, trial playback, and iPad integration.
